description_long: This is a modern, two-story house with a flat roof and a clean, geometric design. The exterior is predominantly white, accented by large windows and a mix of greenery, including a prominent tree in the front yard and palm trees in the backyard. The front features a gated entry with a small porch and steps leading to the main door, while the rear includes a spacious patio, a swimming pool, and a grassy area. The house has multiple balconies and terraces, providing outdoor living spaces on both levels. The window arrangement is mostly asymmetrical, with large panes allowing ample natural light. The overall aesthetic is minimalist, with a focus on open spaces and integration with the surrounding landscape.
description: A modern, two-story white house with flat roof, large windows, front yard greenery, and a backyard pool and patio.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entryway, white fence, porch, and a large tree in the front yard.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the mix of greenery, including bushes and palm trees, and a glimpse of the backyard pool.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the backyard with a swimming pool, patio, grassy area, and palm trees.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing additional windows, terraces, and the continuation of the landscaped yard.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway with a small porch, steps, white fence, and a single door, accented by a large front yard tree.
